name: Breadbasket
description: Landing body shots adds a stack of bonus +55% headshot damage to the next headshot for 10s. Max stack is 3.

name: Perfect Breadbasket
description: Landing body shots adds a stack of bonus +70% headshot damage to the next headshot for 10s. Max stack is 2.

name: Killer
description: Killing an enemy with a critical hit grants +70% critical hit damage for 10s.

name: Perfect Killer
description: Killing an enemy with a critical hit grants +90% critical hit damage for 10s.

name: Preservation
description: Killing an enemy repairs 10% armor over 5s. Headshot kills improve the repair by an additional 10%

name: Perfect Preservation
description: Killing an enemy repairs 15% armor over 5s. Headshot kills improve the repair by an additional 15%

name: Optimist
description: Weapon damage is increased by +3.5% for every 10% ammo missing from the magazine.

name: Perfect Optimist
description: Weapon damage is increased by +4.5% for every 10% ammo missing from the magazine.

name: Strained
description: Gain 10% critical hit damage for every 0.5s you are firing. Stacks up to 5 times.

name: Perfect Strained
description: Gain 10% critical hit damage for every 0.5s you are firing. Stacks up to 8 times.

name: Close & Personal
description: Killing a target within 7m grants +30% weapon damage for 10s.

name: Perfect Close & Personal
description: Killing a target within 7m grants +38% weapon damage for 10s.

name: Fast Hands
description: Critical hits add a stack of 3% reload speed bonus. Max stack is 40.

name: Perfect Fast Hands
description: Critical hits add a stack of 5% reload speed bonus. Max stack is 40.

name: Sadist
description: Amplifies +30% weapon damage to bleeding enemies. After 4 kills, applies bleed to the next enemy you hit.

name: Perfect Sadist
description: Amplifies +35% weapon damage to bleeding enemies. After 3 kills, applies bleed to the next enemy you hit.

name: Eyeless
description: Amplifies +30% weapon damage to blinded enemies. After 4 kills, applies blind to the next enemy you hit.

name: Perfect Eyeless
description: Amplifies +35% weapon damage to blinded enemies. After 3 kills, applies blind to the next enemy you hit.

name: Ignited
description: Amplifies +25% weapon damage to burning enemies.  After 4 kills, applies burning to the next enemy you hit.

name: Perfect Ignited
description: Amplifies +30% weapon damage to burning enemies. After 3 kills, applies burning to the next enemy you hit.

name: Vindictive
description: Killing an enemy with a status effect applied grants you and all allies within 15m 16% Critical hit chance and 16% critical hit damage for 20s.

name: Perfect Vindictive
description: Killing an enemy with a status effect applied grants you and all allies within 15m (20m) 21% Critical hit chance and 21% critical hit damage for 20s.

name: Ranger
description: Amplifies weapon damage by 2% for every 4m you are away from your target.

name: Perfect Ranger
description: Amplifies weapon damage by 2% for every 4m (3m) you are away from your target.

name: Steady Handed
description: Hits grant a stack of +1% Accuracy and Stability. At 100 stacks, consumes stacks to refill the magazine.

name: Perfect Steady Handed
description: Hits grant a stack of +1% Accuracy and Stability. At 75 stacks, consumes stacks to refill the magazine.

name: Spike
description: Headshots grant +20% skill damage for 15s.

name: Perfect Spike
description: Headshots grant +25% skill damage for 15s.

name: Perpetuation
description: Headshots grant +75% status effect damage and duration to the next status effect you apply. Cooldown: 20s.

name: Perfect Perpetuation
description: Headshots grant +75% status effect damage and duration to the next status effect you apply. Cooldown: 20s (16s).

name: Reformation
description: Headshots grant +60% skill repair for 15s.

name: Perfect Reformation
description: Headshots grant +80% skill repair for 15s.

name: Future Perfect
description: Weapon kills grant +1 skill tier for 15s. Stacks up to 3 times. Weapon kills at skill tier 6 grant overcharge for 15s. Overcharge Cooldown: 90s

name: Future Perfection
description: Weapon kills grant +1 skill tier for 15s. Stacks up to 3 times. Weapon kills at skill tier 6 grant overcharge for 15s. Overcharge Cooldown: 90s

name: Flatline
description: Amplifies weapon damage by 15% to pulsed enemies. After 4 kills, applies pulse to the next enemy you hit.

name: Perfect Flatline
description: Amplifies weapon damage by 20% to pulsed enemies. After 3 kills, applies pulse to the next enemy you hit.

name: Sledgehammer
description: Dealing damage with a grenade applies a mark on target. Targets with mark will take 15% more damage to armor from the agent that applied the mark and have a -20% movement speed. Mark will disappear after 10 seconds.

name: Perfect Sledgehammer
description: Dealing damage with a grenade applies a mark on target. Targets with mark will take 20% more damage to armor from the agent that applied the mark and have a -30% movement speed. Mark will disappear after 10 seconds. (As of TU 22.2 the marked targets take the Amp damage from all sources including other agents)

name: Thunder Strike
description: Amplifies 30% extra damage to shocked targets. After 4 kills, applies shock to the next enemy you hit.

name: Perfect Thunder Strike
description: Amplifies 35% extra damage to shocked targets. After 3 kills, applies shock to the next enemy you hit.

name: In Sync
description: Hitting an enemy grants +15% skill damage for 5s. Using a skill or damaging an enemy with a skill grants +15% weapon damage for 5s. Damage increases are doubled while both buffs are active at the same time.

name: Perfect In Sync
description: Hitting an enemy grants +20% skill damage for 5s. Using a skill or damaging an enemy with a skill grants +20% weapon damage for 5s. Damage increases are doubled while both buffs are active at the same time.

name: Pressure Point
description: Amplifies weapon damage by 15% to enemies under status effects.

name: Perfect Pressure Point
description: Amplifies weapon damage by 20% to enemies under status effects.

name: Streamline
description: Increase Weapon Damage by 42% when no Skills are Deployed or on Cooldown.

name: Perfect Streamline
description: Increase Weapon Damage by +47% when no Skills are Deployed or on Cooldown.

name: Immobilize
description: Amplifies weapon damage by 20% to ensared enemies. After 4 kills applies Ensnare to the next enemy you hit.

name: Perfect Immobilize
description: Amplifies weapon damage by 25% to ensared enemies. After 3 kills applies Ensnare to the next enemy you hit.

name: Soft Spot
description: Destroying a Weakpoint grants 19% Weapon Damage for 15s.

name: Perfect Soft Spot
description: Destroying a Weakpoint grants 24% Weapon Damage for 15s.

name: Rifleman
description: Landing headshots adds a stack of bonus +10% weapon damage for 5s.  Max stack is 5. Additional headshots refresh the duration.

name: Perfect Rifleman
description: Landing headshots adds a stack of bonus +11% weapon damage for 5s. Max stack is 6. Additional headshots refresh the duration.

name: Boomerang
description: Critical hits have a 50% chance to return the bullet to the magazine. If a bullet is returned to the magazine the next shot gains 40% increased damage.

name: Perfect Boomerang
description: Critical hits have a 75% chance to return the bullet to the magazine. If a bullet is returned to the magazine the next shot gains 50% increased damage.

name: Lucky Shot
description: Magazine capacity is increased by 20%. Missed shots from cover have a 100% chance to return to the magazine.

name: Perfect Lucky Shot
description: Magazine capacity is increased by 30%. Missed shots from cover have a 100% chance to return to the magazine.

name: Determined
description: After killing an enemy with a headshot the next shot landed on any enemy will be a guaranteed headshot.

name: Perfect Determined
description: After killing an enemy with a headshot the next shot landed on any enemy will be a guaranteed (critical) headshot.

name: Behind You
description: Amplifies weapon damage by +20% to enemies that are not targeting you.

name: Perfect Behind You
description: Amplifies weapon damage by +25% to enemies that are not targeting you.

name: Precision Strike
description: Killing enemies farther than 20m builds up stacks. Max stack is 3. Hitting an enemy within 20m will use all stacks to provide 20% amplified damage to enemies within 20m for 5s.

name: Perfect Precision Strike
description: Killing enemies farther than 20m builds up stacks. Max stack is 2. Hitting an enemy within 20m will use all stacks to provide +35% amplified damage to enemies within 20m for 5s.

name: Near Sighted
description: Receive +80% stability at the cost of -35% optimal range.

name: Perfect Near Sighted
description: Receive +100% stability at the cost of -35% optimal range.

name: On Empty
description: Reloading from empty grants +60% weapon handling for 10s.

name: Perfect On Empty
description: Reloading from empty grants +80% weapon handling for 10s.

name: Measured
description: The top half of the magazine has 25% rate of fire and -25% weapon damage. The bottom half of the magazine has -18% rate of fire and +30% total weapon damage.

name: Perfect Measured
description: The top half of the magazine has 25% rate of fire and -30% weapon damage. The bottom half of the magazine has -18% rate of fire and +38% total weapon damage.

name: Overflowing
description: Every 3 reloads from empty increases your base magazine capacity by 100%.

name: Perfect Overflowing
description: Every 2 reloads from empty increases your base magazine capacity by 100%.

name: Stabilize
description: Firing your weapon increases Weapon Accuracy by 1% and Weapon Stability by 1% per shot up to 60%. If you stop firing, the bonuses reset after 4 seconds.

name: Perfect Stabilize
description: Firing your weapon increases Weapon Accuracy by 1% and Weapon Stability by 1% per shot up to 75%. If you stop firing, the bonuses reset after 6 seconds.

name: Naked
description: Hitting an enemy with no armor grants +50% headshot damage for 5s.

name: Perfect Naked
description: Hitting an enemy with no armor grants +50% headshot damage for 5s (8s).

name: First Blood
description: If scoped, your first shot fired from out of combat or after fully reloading from empty deals headshot damage to any part of the body hit. Requires a Scope with 8x magnification or higher.

name: Perfect First Blood
description: If scoped, your first (2) shot fired(s) from out of combat or after fully reloading from empty deals headshot damage to any part of the body hit. Requires a Scope with 8x magnification or higher.

name: Outsider
description: After killing an enemy, gain 100% optimal range and +100% accuracy for 10s.

name: Perfect Outsider
description: After killing an enemy, gain 150% optimal range and +125% accuracy for 10s.

name: Unwavering
description: Swapping to this weapon grants +300% weapon handling for 5s. Kills refresh the buff. Swapping away disables this from all weapons for 5s.

name: Perfect Unwavering
description: Swapping to this weapon grants +400% weapon handling for 5s. Kills refresh the buff. Swapping away disables this from all weapons for 5s.

name: Unhinged
description: Grants +18% weapon damage at the cost of -25% Stability and -25% Accuracy.

name: Perfect Unhinged
description: Grants +22% weapon damage at the cost of -25% Stability and -25% Accuracy.

name: Frenzy
description: For every 10 bullets in the magazine capacity, gain +3% rate of fire and +3% weapon damage for 9s when reloading from empty.

name: Perfect Frenzy
description: For every 8 bullets in the magazine capacity, gain +3% rate of fire and +3% weapon damage for 9s when reloading from empty.

name: Overwhelm
description: Suppressing an enemy, that is not currently suppressed, grants +10% weapon damage for 12 seconds. Max stack is 4.

name: Perfect Overwhelm
description: Suppressing an enemy, that is not currently suppressed, grants +12% weapon damage for 12 seconds. Max stack is 4.

name: Pummel
description: 3 consecutive kills refills the magazine and grants +40% weapon damage for 10s.

name: Perfect Pummel
description: 2 consecutive kills refills the magazine and grants +40% weapon damage for 10s.

name: Pumped Up
description: Reloading grants +1.2% weapon damage for 10s. Stacks up to 25 times.

name: Perfect Pumped Up
description: Reloading grants +6% weapon damage for 10s. Stacks up to 5 times.

name: Brazen
description: Receive +3.5% Amplified Damage on the next shot with the weapon for each pellet that hits the target, if at least 6 pellets hit.

name: Perfect Brazen
description: Receive +3.5% Amplified Damage on the next shot with the weapon for each pellet that hits the target, if at least 4 pellets hit.

name: Salvage
description: Killing a target has a +70% chance to refill the magazine.

name: Perfect Salvage
description: Killing a target has a +85% chance to refill the magazine.

name: Finisher
description: Swapping from this weapon within 10s of killing an enemy grants 30% critical hit chance and 30% critical hit damage for 15s.

name: Perfect Finisher
description: Swapping from this weapon within 10s of killing an enemy grants 35% critical hit chance and 40% critical hit damage for 15s.

name: Back and Forth
description: Swapping to this weapon grants +10% Rate of Fire and +9% Weapon Damage for 10s. Swapping from this weapon grants +5% Rate of Fire and +4.5% Weapon Damage for 10s. Receiving one of the bonus groups will remove the other if it's still active. Two instances of this talent will not function at the same time.

name: Perfect Back and Forth
description: Swapping to this weapon grants +13% Rate of Fire and +12% Weapon Damage for 10s. Swapping from this weapon grants +5% Rate of Fire and +4.5% Weapon Damage for 10s. Receiving one of the bonus groups will remove the other if it's still active. Two instances of this talent will not function at the same time.

name: Perfect Allegro
description: 12% rate of fire.

name: Perfect Accurate
description: 30% accuracy.

name: Extra
description: +20% magazine capacity.

name: Perfect Extra
description: +30% magazine capacity.

name: Distance
description: +20% optimal range.

name: Perfect Distance
description: +25% optimal range.

name: Perfect Jazz Hands
description: 12% reload speed.

name: Perfect Optimized
description: 20% weapon handling.
